name: Reflex Cat Treats - Dental Care Pocket Treats, Duck 60g
shortDescription: Reflex Cat Treats – Dental Care Pocket Treats, Duck. Perfectly sized cat biscuits for training and for rewarding good behaviour. Made with the highest quality ingredients and bursting with flavour.
description: Reflex Cat Treats - Dental Care Pocket Treats, Duck. Perfectly sized cat biscuits for training and for rewarding good behaviour. Made with the highest quality ingredients and bursting with flavour. INGREDIENTS: Meat and animal derivatives (4% duck), cereals, oils and fats, derivatives of vegetable origin, milk and milk derivatives, minerals. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 21 Crude Fat (%) - 30 Crude Ash (%) - 6 Crude Fiber (%) - 1 Vitamin A - 1,400 IU Vitamin D3 - 210 IU Vitamin E - 79 mg FEEDING RECOMMENDATIONS: Feed as a snack or a treat between the meals. For an adult cat (ca. 4 kg) 6 to 10 pieces per day. This indications are guidelines. Always supply a sufficient amount of fresh drinking water. Once opened keep the package tightly closed. Store in a cool and dry place.
